name: Kimberly Padilla
subject: Peter, we have a problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- last Friday in Columbus, Vice President Pence attacked Sherrod's record. Now we need to step up and show Sherrod that his grassroots team has his back. [**_Will you donate $26 by midnight to our Emergency Response Fund to help us spread the truth about Sherrod's record?_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf85/3089816464/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?refcode=sbe1806018pm_a&amount=26") Vice President Pence wasted no time going after Sherrod. **Peter, we can 't fall short of our Emergency Response Fund. There's too much at stake for hardworking Americans.** **If you can, donate $26, our average contribution, by midnight tonight:[_https://sherrodbrown.com/responsefund_](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf85/3089816464/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?refcode=sbe1806018pm_a&amount=26")** Thanks. Kimberly Kimberly Padilla
Finance Director _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Sherrod
Subject: Pence wants Sherrod gone_ | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf85/3089816464/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?refcode=sbe1806018pm_a&amount=26")
---
**" Pence knocks Sherrod Brown in Ohio, boosts Renacci"**
_The Hill_ , 6/15/18
Peter -- We are launching an emergency response campaign for Sherrod and we need your help.
Last night, Vice President Pence wasted no time attacking Sherrod right here in Ohio.
The Vice President knocking down Sherrod is exactly what we're up against. We're up against outright lies and ridiculous smears. We're up against an Administration that is happy to scam the American people to protect billionaires.
[**_Sherrod needs your support now. Will you donate $26, our campaign 's average contribution, to our emergency response fund by midnight tonight?_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf85/3089816464/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?refcode=sbe1806018pm_a&amount=26")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf84/3089816464/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180618pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf84/3089816464/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180618pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf84/3089816464/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180618pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cc7b/3089816464/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE4cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?refcode=sbe180618pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
The truth is there is no greater champion for Ohio families than Sherrod. That is exactly why Vice President Pence, President Trump and special interests want him gone. They wouldn't be spending so much time and energy in Ohio if they didn't think defeating Sherrod is a possibility.
We are turning to you to help us defend against Pence and the Trump apparatus. [**_We 're behind in our fundraising efforts this month and this emergency response fund is critical to our success._**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff930/4462dc26/516461a4/2007cf85/3089816464/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180618pm?refcode=sbe1806018pm_a&amount=26")

---
Thank you for taking action and your continued support. We rely on all of you.
Team Sherrod

|

name: Data Team@Sinema.org
subject: wow, we are impressed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | | **The Trump administration is taking new steps to strip away your health care protections. Kyrsten Sinema will protect your care in the U.S. Senate, but she can 't get there without your help!

_[Help Kyrsten protect your care>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-health?recurring=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Help+Kyrsten+protect+your+care+gtgt&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2")_**
---

Hey,

We saw a HUGE response to our survey today.

In overwhelming numbers, people took the time to let us know they support protections for people with pre-existing conditions. It's clear our question hit home.

But here's the sad reality: The Trump administration just took action to put these protections at risk.

**Now more than ever, we need a strong leader like Kyrsten in the Senate to protect our care. She knows every American deserves quality, affordable coverage, and she 'll do what it takes to get the job done.**

**_[Can you donate $10 today to help Kyrsten win in November and protect your care?](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-health?recurring=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+donate+10+today+to+help+Kyrsten+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2")_**

Arizonans need leaders who will work to make sure ALL of us have access to affordable health care.

That includes people with pre-existing conditions like cancer, diabetes, heart disease, and asthma -- and even pregnant women -- ALL of whom could be overcharged or denied coverage if the administration succeeds in rolling back patient protections.

This isn't the first time Washington politicians have pushed harmful health care proposals, and it won't be the last.

**_[If we really want to protect our health care, we HAVE to elect more leaders like Kyrsten to the Senate. Will you pitch in now to help Kyrsten win?](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-health?recurring=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+If+we+really+want+to+protect+our+health+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2")_**

Thanks for your support.

Sinema HQ

|
---

Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
Kyrsten is running for the United States Senate because she wants to help Arizonans get their shot at the American dream. She's spent her career fighting for veterans and military families, listening to the middle class, and doing her part to fix a broken Washington.

She can't win this race without support from people like you. You can donate to Sinema for Arizona by [clicking here](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&amount=7&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=4+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2"). Still support Kyrsten but want fewer emails? [Click here](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0c68/45aebd3c/4bacfc1b/2ca93067/3760282571/VEsD/ "http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2") to receive fewer emails from our campaign. And if you'd like to unsubscribe from our list, [click here.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0c68/45aebd3c/4bacfc1b/2ca93060/3760282571/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0YmFjZmMxYiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjU5NWQwYzY4In0=/ "http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/4bacfc1b/595d0c68?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180618_2_2")

PO Box 7586 Phoenix, AZ 85011

name: Matt Brown
subject: #TeamCorey's FIRST General Election Call tomorrow night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc
body:
| [](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conferencecallreminder6_19&n=1)
---
Peter -- First, I would like to say THANK YOU! Without all of your hard work, we would not have been successful- but we're not done yet. The fight to defeat radical leftist Tim Kaine has already started. Please join us tomorrow night, Tuesday, June 19th, for our [weekly Team Corey Conference Call at 8 PM.](https://www.coreystewart.com/team_corey_conference_call_20180619?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conferencecallreminder6_19&n=2) We will discuss our transition to the general election and how you can help in the weeks to come! **Team Corey Conference Call**
Tuesday, June 19th, at 8 PM
(515) 739-6200 code 896695
RSVP to attend [here](https://www.coreystewart.com/team_corey_conference_call_20180619?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conferencecallreminder6_19&n=3) if this is your first call. Best, Matt Brown
Campaign Manager ### Peter -- I would like to thank you for all of your hard work these past few months fighting to Take Back Virginia and defeat Tim Kaine. **We did it!** Without your dedicated commitment to our campaign, we would not have been successful. _But we're not done yet_.... President Trump's movement to fight for America First policies will continue with our campaign in Virginia to defeat Hillary Clinton's failed Vice Presidential Candidate, Tim Kaine. I can't do it without you. Let's #TakeBackVA! For Virginia, Corey Stewart
Candidate for U.S. Senate

Matt Brown
[http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conferencecallreminder6_19&n=4)

| | Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc.____

name: Team Donnelly
subject: the one doing right by workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
"Donnelly has fought tirelessly to protect American workers and ensure we have federal policies that benefit workers in Indiana and across the country." -- Indiana AFL-CIO |
---

| | **" Donnelly has fought tirelessly to protect American workers and ensure we have federal policies that benefit workers in Indiana and across the country."**
\-- Indiana AFL-CIO Peter -- There's only one candidate in this Senate race who does right by workers, and his name is Joe Donnelly.

Joe has fought against trade deals that rig the system against working people, championed labor standards like fair pay, and introduced the End Outsourcing Jobs Act in the Senate. That's why the Indiana AFL-CIO has endorsed him again in 2018.

But the special interests in Washington don't like anything that cuts into their bottom line -- so they're trying to replace Joe with a guy who would rubber stamp bad policies for workers. **Will you chip in to protect Indiana 's Democratic senator?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e46/7377f838/3c92d332/51f92ee9/3338259997/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180618.1nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e46/7377f838/3c92d332/51f92ee8/3338259997/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180618.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e46/7377f838/3c92d332/51f92eeb/3338259997/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180618.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e46/7377f838/3c92d332/51f92eea/3338259997/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180618.1nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e46/7377f838/3c92d332/51f92ee5/3338259997/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180618.1nd")**
Let's talk about Joe's opponent, Rep. Mike Braun. Rep. Braun says he'll create jobs, but the reality is that the company he owns underpaid workers and violated safety rules. He says he'll lower taxes, but in the legislature he voted to raise taxes on Hoosiers (and lower them for himself!).

He says he'll fight for working people, but can a guy who bought the Republican nomination with $6 million really understand the needs of the middle and working class?

**[Peter, we need to stop Rep. Braun and send Joe back to the Senate to fight for us. But our opponents have a ton of cash, so we really need your help. Will you stand up for Joe, the same way he's stood up for workers?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e46/7377f838/3c92d332/51f92ee4/3338259997/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180618.1nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,
Team Donnelly

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e46/7377f838/3c92d332/51f92ee7/3338259997/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180618.1nd&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206

name: The White House
subject: America’s immigration loopholes, by the numbers
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=00da6832bb9540eb6068ac3786100424b620919c3c225d2e444194b187ee05a71b3916238c94dfe1d65138fda198016df111e3258bdf78cb) The White House • June 19, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump will address the National Federation of Independent Businesses' 75th Anniversary Celebration. [Watch live at 12:25 p.m. ET.
---|--- ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04716590db33a5d548f29cb519f57b55dfbe48630fe43580eab54e995d1f58ac78477885066e525b8443bbf49e2adeea61852f9b8873d024) • | Vice President Mike Pence will speak to workers at Nucor Steel Auburn, Inc. in Upstate New York. [Watch live at 2:20 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04716590db33a5d548f29cb519f57b55dfbe48630fe43580eab54e995d1f58ac78477885066e525b8443bbf49e2adeea61852f9b8873d024)
• | President Trump will welcome Their Majesties King Felipe VI and Queen Letizia of Spain to the White House for an expanded bilateral meeting.

---
|

## America's immigration loopholes, by the numbers
**Legal loopholes have hamstrung immigration enforcement** and contributed to the crisis at our border. The number of unaccompanied alien children (UACs) at U.S. ports of entry increased by a staggering _636 percent_ from April 2017 to April 2018. In the last three months, illegal immigration on the southern border exceeded 50,000 people per month--"multiples over each month last year," Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen said yesterday.
**At the same time, loopholes in our asylum laws** have led to a significant spike in asylum claims. Because current law sets an easily met standard for "credible fear," refugees fleeing actual persecution and violence are bogged down in the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services backlog, which has swelled more than 1900 percent since the end of the 2012 fiscal year.
**Any real, lasting solution will require Congress** to close these loopholes. Smugglers and human traffickers understand and have exploited these glaring weak points in our immigration system. "Until these loopholes are closed by Congress, it is not possible, as a matter of law, to detain and remove whole family units who arrive illegally in the United States," Secretary Nielsen said.
[The crisis at America's border, by the numbers](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2dd082b8e551e8885e67a25c3e6ca28289e950423cd2384ed0c9652f8351417a410a3a9d7efa93f8d28c16488b824217d5eecea770ae9a6d)
**Watch** : [Secretary Nielsen's press briefing on illegal immigration ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4122c8cb624c8660b0320233573d11ef20e2e7e1c8e8d8ada2b61d3865b7f7cefb55e0367ff93884cfacdac44e795b0904a98397106dce99)
---
|

## 'Reclaiming America's proud destiny' in the heavens
**"When it comes to space** , too often, for too many years, our dreams of exploration and discovery were really squandered by politics and bureaucracy," President Trump said yesterday as he announced his Administration's third Space Policy Directive. "We don't want China and Russia and other countries leading us. We've always led--we've gone way far afield for decades now."
**As space becomes increasingly contested** , the demand for the U.S. Department of Defense to focus on protecting American space assets and interests also increases. At the same time, the rapid commercialization of space requires a traffic management framework that protects U.S. interests and considers the private sector's needs.
**The new directive builds on President Trump's efforts** to reinstate the American leadership role in space. Last June, the President revived the National Space Council for the first time in 24 years. "This is a giant step toward inspiring future generations and toward reclaiming America's proud destiny in space," President Trump says.
[The Trump Administration is achieving a safe and secure future in space.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=edd243f6a9e9f4e2fe6025562a9467af77cfaa773ce369faae8a8c6ae2497f9f8bf35d0f7b36136782a86bc764423575f5e6844bdf124f4d)
**More** : [What an "America first" National Space Strategy is all about ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d2a228be5348af8d8888a974f9ff9eed76d032a032bb2de59a67188430ce25088b61fd7b68400d093a6ac62cdd4442483305152fa9974049)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Trump and Vice President Pence participate in a meeting of the National Space Council** | June 18, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d19ee3e0fdf9923e0002e817eb417254bff27e2e820ce699b929c1e4a079238b26c3e603a8d6a96e517b02c7c9683da3b5cec106cebe8621) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8a2e391d60f1dd7487db3b1ce50e8a1587acbb38b7af9d3644fd2a5fd91d25226962354060b7d6396e0cd8ae2dbe7a37543ea92eb8e3685) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d49c26e472f74a80a600475729e4dfb79f5a735e44c3122a33866079c18ebe29f7c07b1abbc12da55db7b8997b29b8fd502382bfd75aa596f9)
---

\---------- Forward message ----------
FROM: Mark Warner
SUBJECT: Asking for Tim
Derek, it's officially general election season in Virginia.

My friend and colleague, Tim Kaine, is up against Corey Stewart, a candidate with a history of outperforming polling and spreading hateful rhetoric.

In fact, a poll before the primary showed Stewart was Tim's most challenging opponent, _with Tim only pulling 44% in a match up._ And Stewart said **Democrats won 't be stepping up to support Tim Kaine,** which is how he thinks he will win.

**Success in Virginia this year depends on making sure Tim is able to keep his seat despite these attacks - and do so in a way that helps Democrats win throughout the state.**

[I know what it's like to fight hard for a win - and the reality is, it comes down to every last dollar. Join me in chipping in $5 or $25 to make sure Tim can fight back against whatever Stewart throws his way in the general election.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1382/3e0906/6b8b183e/3e346b78/3616092673/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180618_1_FR_MRW_Warner-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+I+know+what+itrsquos+like+to+fight+hard+&utm_campaign=20180619_1_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD&source=20180619_1_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD")

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: hateful, divisive, and inhumane
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Like you, I am deeply disgusted by President Trump's rhetoric regarding immigrants. In recent weeks, he has sunk even lower.
Children are being heartlessly torn away from their parents at the border, used as pawns to help the Trump administration further its agenda.
Tearing families apart is not consistent with the values that make us strong. That's why I recently cosponsored a bill barring children from being taken from their parents at the border.
[**Please join me and sign my petition to call on President Trump to put an immediate end to the inhumane practice of ripping immigrant children and infants away from their families.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc084/2a380d31/e18569e/f191e1/3143847773/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180619_Families-Should-Stay-Together?source=e20180619_familiestogether_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
The way our country is treating these children -- taking them away from the only families they know and housing them like cattle in cages -- is hateful, divisive, and inhumane.
We have an obligation to stop this, and we have an obligation to speak out.
[**Please add your name to demand that President Trump immediately stop this cruel policy.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc084/2a380d31/e18569e/f191e1/3143847773/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180619_Families-Should-Stay-Together?source=e20180619_familiestogether_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for standing with me,
Senator Maggie Hassan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc084/2a380d31/e18569e/f191e2/3143847773/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: U.S. Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Add your name → Tell the government to stop separating families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
The Trump administration is using children as pawns to deter immigrant parents, many of whom are only seeking asylum to get their families out of unthinkable situations.
---
Earlier this month, when I traveled down to our southern border to visit an immigrant detention facility for children, they wouldn't let me inside. They called the police.

It's outrageous to think a U.S. senator would be barred from entering a federal facility to check on the welfare of children. Such visits are essential to make sure we know what's going on in these facilities and that the children's needs are being met.

At a different facility, a border processing center, I did get in and saw a scene that's seared into my mind: young boys and girls who had been ripped away from their parents with no idea when they might see them again.

**The Trump administration is inflicting harm on children as a strategy for deterring others from coming to the U.S.**

They are using children as pawns to deter other immigrant parents -- many seeking asylum to get their families to safety, and out of unthinkable situations like domestic abuse or gang violence. This is morally bankrupt and wrong on every level.

American taxpayers are funding this operation, so each one of us has a stake in how these children are being treated and how this policy is enacted. This is being done in our names, Derek.

**We must fight back against the Trump administration's inhumane treatment of children and families. Add your name to say you oppose this cruel policy that separates families at the border.**

[ I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052133f/4067b0a/64b7bf668/7fbd12e1/1009465578/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/families-at-the-border?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180619_jm_nd&source=em_20180619_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180619_jm_nd")
Can you imagine coming to a new country seeking asylum from violence, only to have your family torn apart?

Throughout our history, individuals have come here from all parts of the globe to build a better life -- including my own family. As Democrats, we believe that all people deserve to be treated fairly and with dignity -- not have their children ripped away from them.

I want to be very clear: The Trump administration is inflicting harm on immigrant families as a strategy for deterring them from coming to the U.S. They think they can discourage immigrants from seeking asylum by breaking families apart at the border.

Right now it is up to every single one of us to speak out against this assault on immigrant families that thousands of children have already endured.

**[Add your name to condemn the Trump administration's shameful family-separation policies. Tearing apart families at the border is wrong and must end immediately.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052133f/4067b0a/64b7bf668/7fbd12ee/1009465578/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/families-at-the-border?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+condemn+the+Trump+admin&utm_campaign=em_20180619_jm_nd&source=em_20180619_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180619_jm_nd")**

Thanks for being a part of this fight and standing up for children,

Senator Jeff Merkley

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052133f/4067b0a/64b7bf668/7fbd12ef/1009465578/VEsF/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180619_jm_nd&source=em_20180619_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180619_jm_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052133f/4067b0a/64b7bf668/7fbd12ec/1009465578/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180619_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180619_jm_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052133f/4067b0a/64b7bf668/7fbd12ed/1009465578/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180619_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180619_jm_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052133f/4067b0a/64b7bf668/7fbd12ea/1009465578/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180619_jm_nd&source=em_20180619_jm_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052133f/4067b0a/64b7bf668/7fbd12eb/1009465578/VEsB/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180619_jm_nd&source=em_20180619_jm_nd&refcode=em_20180619_jm_nd"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: help make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd756/4fbb2af3/7fdabcdc/5e8bb912/2721170390/VEsH/ "http://www.rosenfornevada.com/")
[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd756/4fbb2af3/7fdabcdc/5e8bb912/2721170390/VEsE/ "http://www.rosenfornevada.com/")
Team -
After a recent poll came out showing us neck and neck with Donald Trump's rubber stamp Dean Heller, _The Washington Post_ reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" in the Senate. It's clear that we have _zero_ path to the Senate majority if we lose here in November.
**That 's why I couldn't be more thrilled that a group of Nevada donors just offered to match every gift until we meet our match goal to help us flip this state _and_ the Senate blue.** (Want to help make history and fight back against Donald Trump? **[Just click here to give $5 and have it matched!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd756/4fbb2af3/7fdabcdc/5e8bb913/2721170390/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azcyNS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk725-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**)
_POLITICO_ reported that our race could be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country - with a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC and GOP mega-donors already lining up with _millions_ to try and hold their Senate majority.
Team, we just can't win this November or regain Senate control unless we take advantage of opportunities like this match. **And with just days to go, we 're still way short of our critical $30,000 match goal. If we're going to turn Nevada blue and take back the Senate, I'm counting on top supporters like you to give now and get your gift doubled:**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen must resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
She has not told the truth, and she has lost our trust. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b342/c1f7015/6828493b/1142ddbf/1908103118/VEsH/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1806_nielsen?source=rtw_20180619_nielsen") Friends, Kirstjen Nielsen has misled the Senate, from the White House podium, and the American people about the Trump Administration's cruel policy of separating children from their parents at the border. And, as Secretary of Homeland Security, she has overseen the pain that has been done to thousands of families in the process. She can no longer be trusted in this role. **That is why I 'm calling on her to resign as Secretary of Homeland Security immediately and asking you to stand with me. [Add your name to my petition here and demand Kirstjen Nielsen resign now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b342/c1f7015/6828493b/1142ddbf/1908103118/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1806_nielsen?source=rtw_20180619_nielsen")** There is nothing written in the law that forces Secretary Nielsen to separate parents from their children. **Let me repeat that, there is _nothing_ in the law that is forcing them to do this.** She is not telling the truth to the American people about both how and why she is enforcing this policy time and time again. It has to stop. **[Add your name to my petition and demand Secretary Nielsen resign immediately.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b342/c1f7015/6828493b/1142ddbf/1908103118/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1806_nielsen?source=rtw_20180619_nielsen")** This is too important to sit back, friend. Tina **[Add My Name](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b342/c1f7015/6828493b/1142ddbf/1908103118/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1806_nielsen?source=rtw_20180619_nielsen")**

name: Mike Thompson
subject: standing with students
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
_You 're receiving this email because you've supported similar campaigns in the past. To unsubscribe, click here: [unsubscribe](http://mikethompsonforcongress.ngpvanhost.com/unsubscribe?mmid=z3NHcjEzHC6-BvaGGEMACbslrmHFO9cJZuTeRcScp88=&tiid=7syg_m6k9akuXtIsnVz203J-BVZxQwx_OGzGJkn9cVE=)_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/z3NHcjEzHC6-BvaGGEMACbslrmHFO9cJZuTeRcScp88=/efdWx_TIdabubpCJY0my2GSx78vbzb9pDKU8pucPZHg=)
Peter,

Over the past few months we have seen an incredible outpouring of energy and activism from students across the country standing up for gun violence prevention.

I'm proud to support them as they continue to speak truth to power and push for the change we so urgently need. In March my team and I participated in March for Our Lives activities across our district, which left me feeling heartened and hopeful that our country's future is in good hands.

[**Add your name if you agree that we must continue to stand behind the students leading the fight, and demand sensible gun violence prevention legislation once and for all >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/z3NHcjEzHC6-BvaGGEMACbslrmHFO9cJZuTeRcScp88=/jQUjwmsnWU__fMwbSZpZfn3776Q4xzqN46UNufM2WHw=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/z3NHcjEzHC6-BvaGGEMACbslrmHFO9cJZuTeRcScp88=/jQUjwmsnWU__fMwbSZpZfn3776Q4xzqN46UNufM2WHw=)
When those in power fail to act, someone must pick up the slack--and student activists have done just that. The passion and drive from student activists has set off a wave of momentum, in a way that lawmakers cannot ignore.

It's past time to reject the hold that the gun lobby has on Congress, and create real solutions to this pressing issue. Our nation's students know that we can't afford to wait any longer.

[**Stand with me and student activists everywhere as we continue pushing for commonsense gun reform --sign on right away!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/z3NHcjEzHC6-BvaGGEMACbslrmHFO9cJZuTeRcScp88=/jQUjwmsnWU__fMwbSZpZfn3776Q4xzqN46UNufM2WHw=)

Thanks for all you do,

Mike

* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/z3NHcjEzHC6-BvaGGEMACbslrmHFO9cJZuTeRcScp88=/KZrZsMak5ZGZmquUMK1F6JgMnf148xCKZiEL7suqGpA=?amount=25&recurring=true)_

name: Jason Yates
subject: Your My Faith Votes Newsletter: America's Future
body:
| | My Faith Votes Newsletter | Volume 2 • Issue 2
---
| [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fnewsletters%2Fvol2-issue2%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180619enl01nd&n=1)
---
| **In this issue:**
* _Virtuous Leadership in America_
* _The Importance of The Primary Elections for Christians_
* _Is There Hope for The Next Generation of Voters?_
* _United. We Stand._

* * *
| [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Farticles%2Fvirtuous-leadership-in-america%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180619enl01nd&n=2)
---
Phil Robertson: America is mired in instability, incivility, and lawlessness. Call me old-fashioned, or call me simple, but from my chair down here in Louisiana, families are broken. Kindness is in short supply. Americans are addicted. Simply put, America has fallen for Satan’s lie that biblical virtues are outdated. | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Farticles%2Fvirtuous-leadership-in-america%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180619enl01nd&n=3)
---
* * *
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Farticles%2Fwhat-christians-need-to-be-reminded-of-before-voting%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180619enl01nd&n=4)

subject: The National Media is Catching On!

body:

---
Friend -- Did you see this?! [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DgDXuPXuqWIk&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cnn_dumpster_ad_fundraiser&n=2) CNN just reported on Richard’s new campaign video, highlighting his no-nonsense attitude towards the problems facing our country. Locally, City Pages [wrote an article](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.citypages.com%2Fnews%2Frichard-painters-first-campaign-ad-is-here-and-you-really-have-to-see-it-video%2F485807921&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cnn_dumpster_ad_fundraiser&n=3) saying that Richard's ad "pretty much demands that you watch it." The media is starting to catch onto what we have known all along; that Richard Painter is the kind of responsible and vociferous voice we need in Washington. Even further, Richard is proving that grassroots democracy is effective and powerful; candidates that serve the people, **no PACs, no dark money, and no Russian agents**. Tina Smith is trying to pretend like Richard doesn’t exist, but we are making that impossible. But where Richard has refused to sell out to lobbyists and special interest groups, Tina Smith continues to take massive contributions from any individual or group who offers. **The more conflicted representatives we have like Tina Smith, the hotter the dumpster fire burns.** **Contribute now and help us take the next step in our historic campaign to weed out corruption in Washington and quench that dumpster fire. ** [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cnn_dumpster_ad_fundraiser&n=4) Thank you for your consideration, Painter For Minnesota

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
The left is unhinged. When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even thre

Friend -

The left is unhinged.

When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even threatened my life and the lives of my children.

But I’m standing up to them – I decided to tell the story **[in my new ad.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0eeaf88fc364ba7967f7b0a8d3a6b72&_e=ygzw3dWW0f5L2oYaXGpAfFAxud9r7ntlGp0jOrmUfKnTzDbP0k6zNoXiEWqGdXtvhckPeXtS0Gu6EKCCUO4mG0MZIpJxxzyhQkObGOUVc66tcb8unkV7pqZjdevlQ7Vf3qF3tFlYV8UuFLGa5PD1MCskheZq6prZ5L1CrfsPqSvjLfPxuY1cqYa8YpqZ5VA2Y3L6eA86isM3KB0J1K76HuvLNCzGw2lbKSN7xCtfCPJ57flc_onpRJM3E57E3ATfssfJoK0_0NHkI8tat5040rSHiSh0cItHUnO75kISFj16bT-VURWMadh5WbUfzapt)**

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0eeaf88fc364ba7967f7b0a8d3a6b72&_e=ygzw3dWW0f5L2oYaXGpAfFAxud9r7ntlGp0jOrmUfKnTzDbP0k6zNoXiEWqGdXtvhckPeXtS0Gu6EKCCUO4mG0MZIpJxxzyhQkObGOUVc66Nzl6aA3wllbbcyDF4Bm6cwhi0ADd-JJ_ItFk9UVIgtJ38bRQSIvlW32HL7_DDXh-b6k4aO9X2_zRfWqXA9o-vwt7VqYpXZUEPdpfJvHu0V6wI4cxAjnwhtZMEyXjRbMnjfZ5xT54m3ALg3lSlED1L_GDYmhSsKXSW99mVkPY3ipJGAZFMeb3OViW85_Zm2CWYYxnj74VkkklsbpbGtMKN)

Friend, standing up for our principles takes guts, but I’m not afraid to do it. I want to show them I’m a fighter – that I’m determined to stand up for what I believe, even when people threaten me. Will you **stand against them** with me? Show me that you’re on my side**[by chipping in $5, $15, or $25.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0eeaf88fc364ba7967f7b0a8d3a6b72&_e=ygzw3dWW0f5L2oYaXGpAfKOyY15PsrTDErRlLvc-IlmSZ97-tMSL0Y_osstdkwaGcBy1peRi7OOKfb0ycu0YrAz7goFOC-rkkOPmQ4P-jrNmGLDo-uN20C9ul8RyyM3SXFnZrmgg_Bx5Ip_NnvN8moDeZWxTMmvbe2Wl1KKNbXqsppov8IfIUMPph01NZH0fmg3P7W0SBdqPNI773QZzM9-gu-dyIFKf8zmUbqRH0J9JzrU_tDrNflSyGDB4RdL9pWVkjC8TYO4Gt7V7s3UA3MV5u8gSeYWZqq7qvgoLdWuRY16pnBYEVn1ENXAH0pzR1ksYJBpZGrZH5LpYoUviH18qXdtf6P_SarM_HPpQU6AfaQuQ_On4l3IYs5mY3spGziUHHb1kjHZ03GHjgY07pnqgFkouERWyzkmT8dSl5NY%3D) **

They’ve seen the conservative reforms I’ve championed alongside Governor Walker like collective bargaining reform, billions in tax cuts and defunding Planned Parenthood.

Now they want to make sure I can’t do the same in Washington with President Trump.

We need to act quickly. The sooner you join me, the clearer our message is: We won’t be intimidated.
[STAND WITH LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0eeaf88fc364ba7967f7b0a8d3a6b72&_e=ygzw3dWW0f5L2oYaXGpAfKOyY15PsrTDErRlLvc-IlmSZ97-tMSL0Y_osstdkwaGcBy1peRi7OOKfb0ycu0YrAz7goFOC-rkkOPmQ4P-jrNmGLDo-uN20C9ul8RyyM3SXFnZrmgg_Bx5Ip_NnvN8moDeZWxTMmvbe2Wl1KKNbXqsppov8IfIUMPph01NZH0fcp_BDvzrmsj5vVyk-mHTeDRxg-62ZW5x1e5KDLMiNWBDwhX4iOVv9rHDbVwh05tsIqY7oLOiNHvbcRTE8e52PVGZbtLVWX-GItddSkDK-xPbV419YuhQVkPWHkHkHeav7zv4rfEGqy35KZ1goM2CxqeI360vYRUNTAhXVAHPkHH6MvLDqIhQAZjjlqPmin6kpTt3ehzArAykHY8wI64owa5kF1xVaktYPqJwHR3pF34%3D)
---

I want to make sure every conservative Wisconsinite can stand up proudly for what they believe in. Together, we can brush off the threats and show them we mean business.

Leah

What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0eeaf88fc364ba7967f7b0a8d3a6b72&_e=ygzw3dWW0f5L2oYaXGpAfJ_f6mDumMkjzMvtgvV5TqnxP3nNGPffP3qavPxkN_gIqHKNbOAbEJV0GAsnRFaKHKj5N_PVYb69U3TBTUsVGmjhse5cBKWc7UVwa1QjrMRjzQbfMpMbmwetbxQp5rEUc9rdPrTz5NVpepspC7Bl89mkEsLcoYaq4Y58IjBORCJvW4eAUTEW1PqIZnjz8EZhsxQrgQqTfjf1twT68dYE3UyMYCWOUvZLFbJF58CKSfXMH8UYes1flFEQQdXOZdZIxeJrxXgsmu3Bjv_85U_idthpfUSjZWzLAeO8THy4r_tfi3zIe4jG7dStEqkoiLbfrfyS4_HN0Rx1t1YVeBQH0EUBx53wmYslQkjiYnsWVVcB) that you care about? That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. clean_body: The left is unhinged. When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even thre Friend - The left is unhinged. When Scott Walker and I took bold action to turn Wisconsin around, they came after us with everything they had. They even threatened my life and the lives of my children. But I’m standing up to them – I decided to tell the story Friend, standing up for our principles takes guts, but I’m not afraid to do it. I want to show them I’m a fighter – that I’m determined to stand up for what I believe, even when people threaten me. Will you stand against them with me? Show me that you’re on my side They’ve seen the conservative reforms I’ve championed alongside Governor Walker like collective bargaining reform, billions in tax cuts and defunding Planned Parenthood. Now they want to make sure I can’t do the same in Washington with President Trump. We need to act quickly. The sooner you join me, the clearer our message is: We won’t be intimidated. I want to make sure every conservative Wisconsinite can stand up proudly for what they believe in. Together, we can brush off the threats and show them we mean business. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Governor’s Education Reform Efforts Supported by Democrats Outside Montpelier
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/philscott/governors-education-reform-efforts-supported-by-democrats-outside-montpelier?e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| **Governor’s Education Reform Efforts Supported by Democrats Outside Montpelier** Most Democrats in the State House are sticking to party lines and opposing the Governor’s education plan -- and these are the voices that tend to be in the news every day. But courageous Democrats outside of Montpelier -- regular Vermonters just like you -- are publicly airing their support for the Governor’s education reform efforts. They know that, with a growing budget surplus, we can prevent property tax rates from increasing AND fully fund school budgets approved by voters this year! While it may make better headlines to cast the debate as an either-or scenario, this is simply not the case. Rick Cowan, a retired school administrator and a Democrat from Rockingham, wonders “how much is enough?” Cowan says, “As a product of public schools, I’m proud of the substantial investment that our state makes in K-12 education. But I’m also very concerned about the danger that sky-high taxes pose for Vermont’s future.” 1 John Freitag, a fellow Democrat from Strafford, added, “I couldn’t agree more -- and I served for over 20 years as Chair of our Town Democratic Committee. **What Governor Scott is proposing is a reasonable and needed adjustment to ensure the long-term viability of both our educational system and the economy on which it depends for funding.** ” 1 The fact is, the state loses an average of three K-12 students every single day, and our workforce has been shrinking for years. That means we have fewer people paying taxes and fewer kids attending our schools -- yet costs increase year after year. Vermont is already unaffordable for too many, and given that we have surplus revenue, we should do whatever we can to make it more affordable for those who want to stay. The Legislature’s most recent proposal would shift the tax burden onto those who pay the non-residential rates, and it’s easy to assume that the only people impacted would be wealthy out-of-staters who own vacation homes in Vermont. But that’s simply not true. In fact, **over** **60% of non-resident property taxes are paid by Vermonters** , including business owners, landlords and tenants, and camp owners. The bottom line is, the status quo is unsustainable. Cowan correctly points out how these problems will catch up with us: **"Demography is destiny, and trends in that realm don’t support unrestrained spending. The taxable income of our second-oldest-in-the-nation population is rapidly declining."** 1 "To the dismay of some of my friends and fellow Democrats, **I find myself squarely on the Governor’s side."** 1 The Governor’s plan would**fully fund school budgets passed this year, generate millions in savings that would be used to hold property taxes level for the next five years, and would use the savings to invest in programs that directly aid student outcomes** \-- through investments in early care & learning, technical education, higher education and more. **Creating the best cradle-to-career education system in the country will not be possible if we cannot have the courage to put each dollar to good use.** And that means, in a year with over $171 million in new revenue, we should be using this surplus money to hold Vermonters harmless from property tax rate increases and to jumpstart education reform.

---
| (1) [https://vtdigger.org/2018/05/31/rick-cowan-much-enough/ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a667ad3e38&e=19cebfe173)
---

Depending on who you are, $7 might seem like a lot or might seem like only a little -- but I can tell you now, the power of grassroots support is that if everyone gave $7 today, it'd mean a whole lot.
It would show folks like Larry Hogan that we're not powered by corporations or big donors, but by real working people -- people like you. People who want to see a better public school system in their county, or affordable, quality healthcare that's accessible to everyone.
[**It can happen if we all pitch in: With seven days left, donate $7 today to fund the fight for a better Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a660/7ab0e2c4/7f944e91/349b9e02/4050778059/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0619A")

Travis

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: A domestic gag rule, the death penalty, + lying to patients >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47a8/24c69fd9/19e316fe1/1880952d/224028247/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact&source=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact")
---

Peter,

Ever since Donald Trump took power a year and a half ago, Republicans have ramped up their attacks on women's rights at every level.

We need to remember everything they've done -- and commit ourselves to electing candidates who can reverse all this damage.

Remember when Trump not only reinstated, but _expanded_ the global gag rule? And now he wants a domestic gag rule, too. **If you believe patients deserve to know all their options -- [donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47a8/24c69fd9/19e316fe1/1880952e/224028247/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180619_email_AbortionAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact&source=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact")**

In Iowa, Republicans passed the _most restrictive_ abortion ban in the nation, banning abortion before most patients even know they are pregnant. **If you believe abortion bans are outrageous and cruel -- [donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47a8/24c69fd9/19e316fe1/1880952f/224028247/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180619_email_AbortionAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact&source=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact")**

In Ohio, 20 Republicans have said they support an all-out ban on abortion that could punish patients who have abortions and their doctors with _the death penalty_. **If you're disgusted by this new low -- [donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47a8/24c69fd9/19e316fe1/18809528/224028247/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180619_email_AbortionAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact&source=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact")**

In Michigan just last week, the Republican-controlled legislature approved a new budget that would defund Planned Parenthood. **If you wholeheartedly support Planned Parenthood -- [donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47a8/24c69fd9/19e316fe1/18809529/224028247/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180619_email_AbortionAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact&source=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact")**

In North Carolina, Republicans voted to give $1.5 million of taxpayer money to fake women's health care centers that lie to patients about their reproductive health care options. **If you believe we need to end the lies -- [donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47a8/24c69fd9/19e316fe1/1880952a/224028247/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180619_email_AbortionAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact&source=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact")**

These attacks need to stop. Period.

And the best way to make sure that happens is to keep fighting every day to elect pro-choice Democratic women and send anti-choice Republicans everywhere packing.

Thanks for being a part of that fight,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c47a8/24c69fd9/19e316fe1/1880952b/224028247/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180619_email_AbortionAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact&source=WQEFER44N_digital_email_20180619_AbortionAttacks_inact")

|

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: ACT NOW: Gun violence is a public health crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | | DeVos embarks on European tour during school safety listening session
---
| School Safety panel will not look at guns, DeVos says
---
We cannot take Betsy DeVos seriously if she does not take guns in our schools seriously.
Not only did she blow off a listening session for the Federal Commission on School Safety, opting instead for a leisurely tour of Europe; she also refused to allow discussion on gun violence during the session.
As a working mother, I have to know with certainty that schools are able to educate my children and keep them safe. We cannot do that without a comprehensive plan for common sense gun reform.
I'm taking action. [**_Add your name if you 're with me._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f31/622b7b5b/1b41a0d5/307b80e8/36654555/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180615c")
The same prohibitions that bar an individual from buying a gun also prohibit ammunition purchases, but there is no verification. I have introduced legislation to require anyone buying ammunition to pass the same background check as anyone buying a gun, with no loopholes. This bill will help to keep bullets out of the hands of those who shouldn't have them. And while no single law will stop every tragedy, this is exactly the kind of common-sense idea that could make a big difference.
We owe it to our children to give them a leader concerned with safety and education, not profits. Betsy DeVos is not the answer.
If you can't bear to see another Parkland or another Santa Fe or another Newtown, then [**_demand DeVos take gun safety in schools seriously._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f31/622b7b5b/1b41a0d5/307b80e8/36654555/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180615c")
Thank you.
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Meet Rob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
Join me in supporting Rob Richardson for Ohio's next Treasurer | | | Friend,
Whether it is the halls of Congress in Washington, D.C. or the State House in Columbus, Ohioans need leaders that have their back. **That is why I am supporting Rob Richardson’s campaign for Ohio’s next Treasurer.**
Who we send to become our state's Treasurer is more important than ever. We need someone in Columbus committed to managing and safeguarding the state’s money -- your money. Ohio needs a Treasurer committed to doing the job, not using the office to promote himself or shallow partisan interests.
Rob understands the power of hard work. He had been told that he would never make it to college, but -- thanks to the value of hard work -- Rob graduated from college and then law school with flying colors. This was all before Rob made history by becoming the youngest ever chair of the University of Cincinnati's Board of Trustees. An incredible feat.
**[I know that Rob will bring this passion to state government as Ohio’s Treasurer. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Rob for Treasurer -- and I hope you’ll join me in supporting his campaign.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.2ig/LXSi9U1_TEGykkkYQuSJbA/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVECGlsFqKkAZWdRIqldi0ZHpAkdI7MNqhe9i8dhiSu-2FrBY65hYeGHFyN4bImAWzdaJNioEqvYc6qKyJdUd3teHxkUnUwIC82x19wjHbQ42rssRzGXbrhGQRYn-2FymxyaPD49be0uS2fvLZnyLyg4dFDqhqS-2FOAxLYwJyfvb8ed8OwmMp20xKGmBoVwRXV2L2-2FsCmnXnCUzqAJZkiK1F5DfB9byaIDMXNz6cxQMYtUlddug-3D-3D)** ****_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

name: Team Scholten
subject: Steve King Keeps Getting Worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Since the start of this campaign, J.D. has talked about the fact that **it’s not enough to just be _AGAINST_ Steve King, but that we also need to be giving people something to vote _FOR_.** Sometimes, however, the things that King says are simply too much to ignore. We just cannot allow these types of divisive and incendiary comments and actions to become normalized. So here’s a snapshot of the past week, highlighting where the two candidates stand on some issues that have recently received a great deal of attention...
**On neo-Nazis:**
Steve King made national headlines last week when he retweeted a well-known neo-Nazi in Europe. Despite a major backlash against this, as well as King being told the source of the original tweet, he has refused to delete the post.
J.D Scholten said in response: “It's bizarre that Steve King, as a member of Congress from Iowa, would know who this Collett character is, let alone retweet him. Maybe King doesn't know about this guy's admiration for Hitler or being a neo-Nazi sympathizer, or maybe he does? All I know is that I am proud that America's greatest generation heroically defeated the Nazis. And once again, King is showing us where his priorities are, retweeting a February article from Breitbart posted by a neo-Nazi in Europe. King spends more time pushing his extreme agenda and glorifying right wing nationalists overseas than he does working to help the people of this district. Normalizing divisiveness and politics of hate is a disservice to all of us and is an affront to what America stands for. Iowa's 4th Congressional District, Iowa, and America deserve better.”
**White Nationalists:**
Steve King’s “house.gov” website features a page titled “Illegal Immigration Stories”, which contains information about “illegal aliens” who have allegedly committed crimes. The page cites a white nationalist publication called VDare. The Anti-Defamation League wrote that VDare is a racist site that “posts, promotes, and archives the work of racists, anti-immigrant figures, and anti-Semites”.
J.D’s campaign slogan is “Standing Tall for All,” not just because he’s 6’6”, but because he stands for equality and civil rights for all Americans - without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, or disability.
**Separating immigrant children from their families:**
Steve King: "There's nothing cruel about this. These are children that are cared for with better care than they get in their home country. They get everything they need... I don’t know how you could ask for more than that.”
J.D Scholten: “Question, Steve King, children don't need their parents? Most Republicans even agree that separating these kids from their parents is cruel and uncalled for, and they’re willing to end the process if we increase funding for the border wall yet again. It’s unconscionable that we’re using these kids as political bargaining chips.”
While Steve King wants to ramp up mass deportations, we’ve got a better idea: **Let’s deport Steve King from Congress instead!**
[**Click here to help make that happen with a contribution today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1444355/7842570/376313801?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwZTk0My1mZjczLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCIqO83BOxxzlhSstVoY1EEcCC4xm4jBn4qJdT4ARZg=)
As J.D. likes to say, "If we work together, we can build a 4th District, an Iowa, and an America that truly Stands Tall for All!"
Thank you,
Team Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1444356/7842571/376313801?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwZTk0My1mZjczLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCIqO83BOxxzlhSstVoY1EEcCC4xm4jBn4qJdT4ARZg=)

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a7ef6cb0-f973-e811-80c2-00155dc33681/fe10e943-ff73-e811-80c2-00155dc33681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwZTk0My1mZjczLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCIqO83BOxxzlhSstVoY1EEcCC4xm4jBn4qJdT4ARZg=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
June 19, 2018
Contact: Press@johnkasich.com
**
**
**ICYMI: John Kasich: “This solution is insane. It’s ridiculous. You can’t start dividing families.”**
Last night Governor Kasich talked with Brian Williams on The 11th Hour about the recent immigration actions by the Trump administration. Governor Kasich said the Trump administration’s “solution is insane. It’s ridiculous. You can’t start dividing families.”

Kasich also said, “This is not the America you and I have known throughout our lifetime here...When I look down at the border, I feel as though in some people’s eyes these people are objects, they’re not people. They are people. They’re flesh and they’re blood and they bleed and they cry. We have to care about them. How we ultimately solve this is something that needs to be addressed. It doesn’t take away from the fact that the human element is what’s most important here. We have an expectation to do something that’s bold, and has courage and is big and is righteous.”

We have an expectation to do something that’s bold, and has courage and is big and is righteous.” View on social media: "Facebook" "Twitter" Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com "Facebook" "Twitter" "Web Site" "Instagram" "YouTube"

* Yesterday, the Supreme Court dismissed two cases that could have ended the threat of extreme partisan gerrymandering.
* Today, Vice President Pence is campaigning to help our opponent Scott Wagner defeat Tom.

If Scott Wagner becomes Pennsylvania's next governor, he'll bring back Pennsylvania's old gerrymandered maps -- some of the worst gerrymandered districts in the entire country.

We can't let Mike Pence and Scott Wagner turn back the clock on our progress to make elections fair. name: Bob Casey
subject: we can't go back -- help protect health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6626/51dbcc2a/555ab28/3a5d46b/3262836358/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

I'm usually a pretty low-key guy, but I can't help but get angry when politicians put profits before people.

So when the Trump administration announced their latest plan to undermine the Affordable Care Act earlier this month, I was furious. They're putting protections for people with pre-existing conditions -- half of Americans under age 65 -- on the chopping block. It's one of the most consistently popular pieces of the ACA, and it has truly changed lives for people in every corner of Pennsylvania and across the nation.

[**_There are a lot of reasons why I'm asking Pennsylvanians to re-elect me in November, but this month, continuing to defend affordable health care with two fists up has been at the top of my mind. If you could chip in $5 to support me in this fight, I'd really appreciate it._**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180619_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Look, I know the ACA isn't perfect -- we still have a lot of work to do to bring costs down. But what the Trump administration is doing is __sabotage__ , and millions of Americans will pay the price if we don't stop them.

Republicans have tried to repeal the ACA so many times that I've lost count, but a recent attempt only failed by one vote. If my opponent wins this race, team, it's over -- he'll be the one vote to repeal, and all of the protections we fought so hard for will be gone. If you believe that we need to expand access to affordable health care, not take it away, you need to be invested in the fight for a Democratic Senate majority. And that starts right here, by protecting this seat.

**I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important, but there's just too much at stake. Can you show your commitment to affordable health care by chipping in today?**

Here's the link: [**_secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180619_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Thanks,

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180619_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Add Your Name - Tell the Congress to pass the Keep Families Together Act and we can put an end to Trump's policy of separating children from their parents at the U.S. / Mexico border.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
It is a moral abomination. It must be stopped.
#
Friends -
The Trump administration has reached a new low. After having nothing but praise for Kim Jong Un, the leader of the most despotic government on Earth, Trump has now initiated policies in our own country that are unprecedented in their cruelty.
Like you, I have watched with horror and disgust the countless stories and images of children being ripped away from their parents and stuck in **cages** for days, weeks and months without any contact or information about their well-being. I have read about parents being sent back to their home country without their children, and even stories about parents so distraught about the separation that they have ended their own lives.
As former First Lady Laura Bush stated; "Our government should not be in the business of warehousing children in converted box stores or making plans to place them in tent cities in the desert outside of El Paso. These images are eerily reminiscent of the internment camps for U.S. citizens and noncitizens of Japanese descent during World War II, now considered to have been one of the most shameful episodes in U.S. history."
The Trump administration policy of separating children from their parents at our border is a national disgrace. It is a moral abomination. And it can be stopped.
Like every member of the Senate Democratic Caucus, I have added my name as a co-sponsor of the Keep Families Together Act - legislation that would stop this detestable policy. Unfortunately, not one Republican senator has yet signed on. I need you to make your voice heard if we are going to change that:
**[Add Your Name- Tell the Congress to pass the Keep Families Together Act and we can put an end to Trump's policy of separating children from their parents at the U.S. / Mexico border.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigrant-families?source=em180619-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigrant-families?source=em180619-t1-full")**
More than any other country in the history of the modern world, the United States has been shaped in its identity and character by the process of immigration and the contributions of those immigrants.
I am proud to be the son of an immigrant.
My father came to this country from Poland without a nickel in his pocket.
And as a nation built by immigrants, we must strive for humane immigration policies that unify families, not tear them apart.
The Trump administration's policy of separating children, including infants as young as one year old, from their parents at the border is inhumane, cruel and an affront to our values as Americans.
Tell Congress to act to stop it, today:
**[Add Your Name- Tell the Congress to pass the Keep Families Together Act and we can put an end to Trump's policy of separating children from their parents at the U.S. / Mexico border.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigrant-families?source=em180619-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigrant-families?source=em180619-t1-full")**
Over the course of the next days and weeks, I suspect we will talk a lot about comprehensive immigration reform. But what cannot get lost in the details here is that we are talking about people. We are talking about families.
It is time for this injustice to end.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigrant-families?source=em180619-t1-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/immigrant-families?source=em180619-t1-full")******
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Action Alert (via Martin Heinrich)
subject: Martin is trying to reach you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Don't miss Martin's note, team. Title X providers in New Mexico and nationwide are at risk if President Trump's new rule goes through. We set an ambitious goal of 10,000 signers by midnight and we have yet to reach our goal (still 3,235 short!).

We noticed you haven't signed your name yet to our petition, and we implore you to do so before midnight tonight.

[**ADD YOUR NAME: show you support Title X health care providers and don 't want them silenced >>**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b990/43d8135f/60abb7fb/5100aa91/602516851/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+show+you+support+Title+X+h&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2")

**Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:**

> _HUGE: There 's only one federal grant program dedicated to family planning, and President Trump is trying to silence health care providers._
>
> [**Tell Trump: Stop the attacks on family care!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b990/43d8135f/60abb7fb/5100aa90/602516851/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Tell+Trump+Stop+the+attacks+on+family+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2")
>
> * * *
>
> Here's what's happening,
>
> Last month, the Trump administration announced a new rule that would ban Title X medical providers from discussing women's medical options or risk losing their funding.
>
> **In New Mexico, we received over $3.3 million in Title X grants to support 67 care sites in 2017.** Putting this support at risk is bad news for New Mexicans and the millions of Americans that rely on Title X providers to receive comprehensive family planning and preventive health care services.
>
> I'm working with Democrats and organizations nationwide to put a stop to President Trump's proposed 'gag rule', but we need to show that Americans are paying attention to these latest health care attacks.
>
> [**To help raise awareness and put pressure on President Trump, I 've set a goal for 10,000 petition signers in the next 48 hours. Please, can you be one of the 10,000 we need to show President Trump that Americans stand against his Title X attacks?**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b990/43d8135f/60abb7fb/5100aa93/602516851/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+To+help+raise+awareness+and+put+pressure&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2")
>
> [STAND AGAINST TRUMP >>](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b990/43d8135f/60abb7fb/5100aa92/602516851/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+STAND+AGAINST+TRUMP+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2")
> Tens of thousands of New Mexicans depend on Title X services every year, but the Trump administration's latest proposal would put their care at risk. If this rule goes into effect, it will be much harder for individuals and families to get the care they need.
>
> **Limiting what Title X providers can discuss with patients will lead to worse health care outcomes, plain and simple. That is why I am organizing to stop this rule, and I need your help.**
>
> [**Be one of the 10,000 signers we need to send the message to Trump: We want you to stop the Title X gag rule!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b990/43d8135f/60abb7fb/5100aa95/602516851/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Be+one+of+the+10000+signers+we+need+to+s&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2")
>
> I appreciate your action to raise awareness for this latest attack on health care. We must remain vigilant in the face of decisions like this.
>
> Thank you,
> Martin
>
> [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b990/43d8135f/60abb7fb/5100aa94/602516851/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-stop-gag-rule%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2%26amount%3D5%26recurring%3Dtrue?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180619_1_2")
