name: Mary Barzee Flores
subject: We cannot give up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress |
body:
As if the devastating images of crying children being separated from their mothers and fathers weren’t enough, it was revealed today that Miami-Dade County is home to a secret, jail-like facility that houses untold numbers of migrant children.

It makes me sick to my stomach knowing that only a few miles down the road from where my family lives, scores of innocent children are being held like prisoners.

The Trump administration policy of family separation is nothing short of immoral. The mass incarceration of children is immoral. This must end.

And yet our current Congressman has done nothing to alleviate this gross injustice but offer hollow words of disappointment. Mario Díaz-Balart says what he believes we want to hear, and yet he does nothing while young, scared boys and girls sit desperate and terrified, in internment facilities managed by private prison operators like GEO Group - one of Mario’s major campaign contributors.

Díaz-Balart’s inaction in the face of this sort of abject immorality is nothing short of cowardice. We can debate differences in public policy, or the role of government in our lives, but there is no room for debate when it comes to these children.

We cannot give up on these kids. Lip service is not enough. But it’s all we are getting from Mario Díaz-Balart. And that - in and of itself - is as immoral as it is cowardly.

- Mary Barzee Flores

-----------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress |
-----------------------------------------------------

Mary Barzee Flores for Congress c/o – Gloria Maggiolo
6619 S Dixie Hwy, #148
Miami FL 33143 United States

We need all hands on deck to help Donna win the race for Prince George's County Executive. **[Will you sign up to be a volunteer poll worker during the early vote period?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3b/767134fb/5f57c717/43383052/1606509093/VEsE/ "https://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** We're growing a movement made up of teachers, working families, and community leaders coming together to help make her vision a reality, and to ensure our county has the leadership it deserves. **[Join Team Donna and sign up to volunteer for the last few days of early voting.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3b/767134fb/5f57c717/43383052/1606509093/VEsF/ "https://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/s/sign-up-to-be-a-pollworker-volunteer")** Thank you for your continued support for Donna Edwards. name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is not right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Take Action: Immigrant parents and children are being forcibly separated right here.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c13/2f5ea88d/704d87ca/2cbceee8/692511765/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/detention-must-stop?utm_source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&utm_campaign=child-detention&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Trump's forcible separation of immigrant parents from their children is more horrific than even I imagined. Women and children kept in fenced cages. People deprived of clean water, blankets, and sleeping mats. Taunting and verbal abuse by federal agents. Children, some as young as 12 months old, forcibly removed from their mothers. **Shockingly, that's what's going on in our federal prisons.** I learned the appalling details during a protest outside the prison where federal agents are detaining 206 refugees, most of them women. As hundreds of us raised our voices, horrendous accounts of the brutal treatment women inside the prison were receiving emerged. I was sick to my stomach. [**Friend, this is not who we are as Americans. All of us must condemn this abominable policy being carried out in our name. We need the other Washington to change right now. Please add your name right now to demand an end this inhumane treatment of refugees.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c13/2f5ea88d/704d87ca/2cbceee8/692511765/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/detention-must-stop?utm_source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&utm_campaign=child-detention&utm_medium=ema") It's not even a question: The Trump administration's continuing brutal separation of parents from their children is abhorrent and morally bankrupt. Cruelty to children should never be a part of American policy. America is better than this. The callous indifference and inhumane treatment of children must stop. Anyone with a drop of blood in their heart can understand the anxiety and fear and trauma caused by being separated from your parents. I want answers from the Trump administration and the officials responsible for executing this extreme policy, and I'm not going to give up until I have answers -- and children are reunited with their parents. [**Will you join me in the fight to restore the American values Donald Trump and his surrogates are trampling over? Add your name today.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c13/2f5ea88d/704d87ca/2cbceee8/692511765/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/detention-must-stop?utm_source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&utm_campaign=child-detention&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c13/2f5ea88d/704d87ca/2cbceee8/692511765/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/detention-must-stop?utm_source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&source=ema_2018-06-19_child-detention&utm_campaign=child-detention&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Smith=20for=20Congress?=
subject: [Draft] Help Steve Smith Smash the "Blue Wave"
body:
Let's flip CD1 from Democrat to Republican!!! -- | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/stevesmithaz.com/smash-the-blue-wave-2666359?e=1fa29a1af8)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Fellow Patriot,
Did you know our Congressional District 1 has been rated _the_ _most_ _likely_ _to_ _flip_ from Democrat to Republican this year –– if we have the right candidate?

**Steve Smith is the right candidate!**

While others talk about what they _want_ to do, Steve has actually done it! He has a proven conservative record as a State Senator, with the highest ratings possible from every conservative watchdog group you can think of. He’s been named a champion for _taxpayers_ , _veterans_ , and for _securing our border_. That's why he’s been endorsed by the National Border Patrol Council, and so many conservative leaders like Senator Ted Cruz and Congressman Andy Biggs.

**The Primary is August 28****th****and we can’t win this alone.**

**We need help getting out the vote! ** Please join us in supporting Steve Smith with canvassing and phone banking.

We are walking and making calls **every weekend**! If you can help us pass out literature and identify people who want yard signs in your neighborhood, or help us make some phone calls for a couple of hours either Saturday or Sunday, please call **Linda at 516-784-9417 or reply to this email**. We can provide you with walk lists for your neighborhood or any other area of the district. Just let us know what you need. **If you can't join us, you can make calls for Steve at your convenience from home. **Our "Phone From Home" system is easy to use and works around YOUR schedule, without revealing your phone number.

**This weekend, we are focusing on voters in the cities of Maricopa and Casa Grande.** If you live nearby or can help us out, please RSVP.

Let’s send the “progressives” and their supposed “blue wave” packing this year by hitting them hard with a proven, Constitutional conservative!

You can learn more about Steve and his record by visiting [SteveSmithAZ.com](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=c871ed6fe7&e=1fa29a1af8).

**Thank you for your support, and God Bless.**

Jordan Kittleson
Campaign Manager
Steve Smith for Congress

clean_body: Let's flip CD1 from Democrat to Republican!!! -- | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, Did you know our Congressional District 1 has been rated the most likely to flip from Democrat to Republican this year –– if we have the right candidate? Steve Smith is the right candidate! While others talk about what they want to do, Steve has actually done it! He has a proven conservative record as a State Senator, with the highest ratings possible from every conservative watchdog group you can think of. He’s been named a champion for taxpayers , veterans , and for securing our border. That's why he’s been endorsed by the National Border Patrol Council, and so many conservative leaders like Senator Ted Cruz and Congressman Andy Biggs. The Primary is August 28thand we can’t win this alone. We need help getting out the vote! Please join us in supporting Steve Smith with canvassing and phone banking. We are walking and making calls every weekend! If you can help us pass out literature and identify people who want yard signs in your neighborhood, or help us make some phone calls for a couple of hours either Saturday or Sunday, please call Linda at 516-784-9417 or reply to this email. We can provide you with walk lists for your neighborhood or any other area of the district. Just let us know what you need. If you can't join us, you can make calls for Steve at your convenience from home. Our "Phone From Home" system is easy to use and works around YOUR schedule, without revealing your phone number. This weekend, we are focusing on voters in the cities of Maricopa and Casa Grande. If you live nearby or can help us out, please RSVP. Let’s send the “progressives” and their supposed “blue wave” packing this year by hitting them hard with a proven, Constitutional conservative! You can learn more about Steve and his record by visiting . Thank you for your support, and God Bless. Jordan Kittleson Campaign Manager Steve Smith for Congress | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | Thank you for subscribing to the Steve Smith for Congress campaign updates list. Our mailing address is: Steve Smith for CongressPO Box 1164Maricopa, AZ 85139-0350 //SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/vcard?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=8f65adf258 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Team Beto
subject: Beto spoke with Rachel Maddow about our march to Tornillo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Friends,
Last night, Beto joined Rachel Maddow at the desk to share what happened on Father's Day when over a thousand people joined him in marching to Tornillo -- where hundreds of immigrant children are now in tents after being separated from their parents. He also spoke about what he witnessed while visiting McAllen last week.
[**Click below to watch and share the video with your friends and family.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921e8/3b1d797/78ea901f/35a9b473/1633885458/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/betoorourke/videos/1686998601349843/")
[](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921e8/3b1d797/78ea901f/35a9b473/1633885458/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/betoorourke/videos/1686998601349843/")
**[Watch and share](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921e8/3b1d797/78ea901f/35a9b473/1633885458/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/betoorourke/videos/1686998601349843/")**
Here's an excerpt from Beto's interview with Rachel Maddow last night:
"I want to bring this to everyone's attention, because some people say: 'This is not us, we would never do this, this isn't America.' But we're doing this right now -- it's being done in our name. This is America.

...we're not a country that is gonna take kids from their parents after they've survived a two thousand mile journey fleeing the most brutal, the most violent, the deadliest countries in this hemisphere if not the planet. We're a country that's going to make sure we follow our own laws...we gotta be there, we gotta own this, we gotta make this better."
**Beto on MSNBC, 6/18/18**
Beto isn't just talking the talk, he's walking the walk -- on this issue and so many others. Let's make sure everyone across Texas hears what he said last night.
[**Please help spread the word by sharing Beto's interview with Rachel Maddow.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921e8/3b1d797/78ea901f/35a9b473/1633885458/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/betoorourke/videos/1686998601349843/")
Thanks for joining us in this fight.
Team Beto

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921e8/3b1d797/78ea901f/35a9b474/1633885458/VEsD/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921e8/3b1d797/78ea901f/35a9b475/1633885458/VEsA/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921e8/3b1d797/78ea901f/35a9b476/1633885458/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

# A Note From Hayden
Friends:

We now have five months until one of the most important elections in our nation's history. In November, the American people will decide which direction our country will go, and we MUST ensure that we are victorious.

This campaign relies on monthly donations from everyday people who are outraged at the policies of this administration and determined to bring positive change to the people of Arkansas' 4th District.

We are $4,000 away from meeting our fundraising goal for the month, and with your help, we can get there. Will you pledge $25 each month to help turn this district blue? We need you. Arkansas needs you. America needs you.

Click [HERE](https://haydenforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00c7d4e4fc0f592a26f7d559b&id=6c0b2eb14b&e=fa4530268f) and check the box that says "make this a recurring monthly donation."

And thank you. After all, it's our tomorrow.

Hayden

name: Casey HQ
subject: falling short of our goal -- can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e662a/51dbcc2a/5495a37/3a5cecb/2338268828/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Team -- we're in trouble.

Over the weekend, the Republican National Committee announced that they will hire at least 500 field staffers in states like Pennsylvania over the next five months.

We just had our weekly budget meeting, and with the numbers we've put up so far this month, Bob just can't compete with that. Trump has spent months signaling to his rich and powerful allies that they needed to help Congressman Lou Barletta win this seat. The RNC has already knocked on over 195,000 doors in Pennsylvania in support of the president's anti-middle-class tax scheme, and that's just the tip of the iceberg.

If we don't raise $8,700 by midnight **__tonight__** , then we'll have to start pulling our ads off the air, making it even harder to compete with the RNC's ground game. [**_Chipping in just $5 goes a long way towards making sure we can keep getting Bob 's message out -- can you help out?_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180619_fr2_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Bob continues to fight against the Trump administration's dangerous and divisive agenda with both fists up, but because of that, the GOP is going all in to try and flip this seat. 500 field staffers are just the start, and we need to be ready for whatever they throw at us next.

**Now, more than ever, Bob needs your help to hold off the GOP 's attacks so he can keep fighting for Pennsylvania. Can you help defend him?**

clean_body: "" Team -- we're in trouble. Over the weekend, the Republican National Committee announced that they will hire at least 500 field staffers in states like Pennsylvania over the next five months. We just had our weekly budget meeting, and with the numbers we've put up so far this month, Bob just can't compete with that. Trump has spent months signaling to his rich and powerful allies that they needed to help Congressman Lou Barletta win this seat. The RNC has already knocked on over 195,000 doors in Pennsylvania in support of the president's anti-middle-class tax scheme, and that's just the tip of the iceberg. If we don't raise $8,700 by midnight tonight , then we'll have to start pulling our ads off the air, making it even harder to compete with the RNC's ground game. "" Bob continues to fight against the Trump administration's dangerous and divisive agenda with both fists up, but because of that, the GOP is going all in to try and flip this seat. 500 field staffers are just the start, and we need to be ready for whatever they throw at us next. Now, more than ever, Bob needs your help to hold off the GOP 's attacks so he can keep fighting for Pennsylvania. Can you help defend him? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks. | Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

subject: Burning the Deep State...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=8fec14f1f3&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| _Courtland Sykes at the America First U.S. Senate Forum in St. Louis._
---
|
---
| **We are at an inflection point in the United States right now. **

With the corrupted elements of the FBI unravelling before our eyes this week, the Swamp is learning fast that there are a few good men and women willing to stand up and fight a Deep State that, until now, seemed too entrenched to ever defeat.

**Just this week:**
* **CONFIRMED: The FBI at the top had been weaponized to favor and help elect Hillary Clinton. **The** ** Department of Justice's Investigator General uncovered blatant bias that anti-Trump elements in the FBI (at the top) exercised in order to protect Hillary Clinton and to tear down Donald Trump. [Watch](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=213ebbc637&e=9da9b0ca31)
* **CONFIRMED: Mueller's "Russia Investigation" is revealed to be a complete sham** \-- biased and tainted from day one and designed specifically to take down the Trump Administration. [Read](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=fbb3f9eb7e&e=9da9b0ca31)
* **CONFIRMED: Comey and the FBI swept Hillary's criminal activity under the rug** \-- Comey decided beforehand the outcome of Hillary's email "investigation" deciding that she would emerge "innocent" before the investigation even started. [Watch](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=866984e501&e=9da9b0ca31)

The leftist elites in Washington are drowning in their own lies and will do anything to get back at the American people who elected President Trump.

How?

They will lie, cheat, swindle and suppress good candidates around the country who are running on a platform to purge the Deep State.

I am on that list.

**I am running because I will expose the bias and the double standards and the dark actors operating in the Deep State.**

**I will publicly stand by and defend the president.**

**I will fight the Deep State because I know how -- I know where the targets are.**

I need your help.

[Stand with me.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=e64aa0f484&e=9da9b0ca31)

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Join Richard in Duluth to Protest Donald Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=duluth_trump_events&n=1)
---
Friend -- As most of you are aware, the Liar-in-Chief, Donald Trump is coming to Duluth, Minnesota to hold a rally this Wednesday evening. Richard and his campaign team going to make sure he has a nice warm welcome when he arrives to our state. Richard will be in Duluth all afternoon joining DFL and Progressive groups in a united front against the President. As one of the most public faces in the anti-Trump movement, Richard plans to show President Trump that he, his accomplices, and his cronies are not welcome in Minnesota. Richard will first appear at the **Solstice Peace Rally at Leif Erickson Park****from 5 to 6**. This is a non-partisan peace rally that will include music, poetry and speakers from the community. Richard’s second event will be the **Blue Wave 2018 Rise and Resist Rally at Lake Place Park from 6:30 to 8.** This event is meant to unify Democrats around the state, and to make sure they know that the most important thing they can do to combat the criminal Trump Administration is to vote for Democrats on August 14th and November 6th. The Rise and Resist Rally looks to be very busy. The best way for you to find us and other supporters is to look for the giant “Painter for Minnesota” sign that we will be flying. Come join us to get rally signs, stickers, and buttons to **show your support for the only candidate who will publicly stand up to the corruption of Donald Trump!** We hope to make this a night Donald Trump would like to forget. Painter For Minnesota
[http://www.painterminnesota.com/](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=duluth_trump_events&n=2)
---
| [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRWPMinnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=duluth_trump_events&n=3) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRWPMinnesota&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=duluth_trump_events&n=4) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Frwpminnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=duluth_trump_events&n=5)

subject: The latest poll is in:
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3027/9e00690/46563896/2402290f/2849950257/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&source=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx")
Friends,

**The latest poll is in -- and Andrew is winning!**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3027/9e00690/46563896/2402290e/2849950257/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-poll?gpsid=9_55_1390&source=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2")
---
[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3027/9e00690/46563896/24022901/2849950257/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-poll?gpsid=9_55_1390&source=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")
This is huge, friends.

Andrew has been campaigning all over this state for more than a year -- and with these results, it's clear Andrew is poised to win this primary. Andrew's the only non-millionaire in this race, and he can't write our campaign a big six-figure check.

**[But as long as we communicate to primary voters, we will win -- so chip in $5 now and let's keep the momentum going.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3027/9e00690/46563896/24022900/2849950257/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-poll?gpsid=9_55_1390&source=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+But+as+long+as+we+communicate+to+primary")**

Andrew is running on a bold, progressive agenda to invest more than $1 billion in our public schools and students, give teachers and support staff the raise they deserve, make quality health care a constitutional right for all Floridians, and fight for Medicare-for-All.

With ten weeks to go until the primary, every dollar you can give helps us get one step closer to electing a true progressive to the Governor's mansion. **[Chip in $5 now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3027/9e00690/46563896/24022903/2849950257/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-poll?gpsid=9_55_1390&source=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in++ask++now")**

Thank you,

Brendan McPhillips
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3027/9e00690/46563896/24022902/2849950257/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-poll?gpsid=9_55_1390&source=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_Poll_fnd_gq_nopn___ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=6+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I'm recalling our troops from the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Separating children from their parents at the border is wrong, period.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a07/2fde7c66/4694e820/15683556/2890544383/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-border?gpsid=8_43_1399&source=em18_180619_border_adv_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_border_adv_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Hello,

Separating children from their parents at the border is wrong, period.

The recent policy enacted by the Trump administration is cruel and goes against what our country stands for.

Today, as a result of this policy, I recalled our North Carolina National Guard troops from the border. A policy this wrong demands a strong response.

**[Now I want you to get involved. I'm calling on the Trump administration to end this policy immediately. Add your name if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a07/2fde7c66/4694e820/15683569/2890544383/VEsE/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-border?gpsid=8_43_1399&source=em18_180619_border_adv_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_border_adv_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=2+-+Now+I+want+you+to+get+involved+Im+callin")**

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a07/2fde7c66/4694e820/15683568/2890544383/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-border?gpsid=8_43_1399&source=em18_180619_border_adv_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_border_adv_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+rarr")
